title: rubus lingtianus
intro: Rubus lingtianus, also known as the Lingtian raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lingtianus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus lingtianus is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
